news.summary: Bothell, Washington - On May 8, 2025, BioLife Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLFS), a prominent provider of cell processing tools and services for the cell and gene therapy (CGT) sector, has released updated call-in details for their Earnings.
news.headline: BioLife Solutions provides corrected call-in numbers for Earnings Call on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced widespread early gains driven by positive news of a trade deal between the United States and Britain, alleviating concerns among investors. Robinhood saw a significant increase. The Dow Jones ended the day 250 points higher due to the trade development, while Boeing outperformed as its stock surged past the buy point. Additionally, Bitcoin surpassed the $100,000 mark, marking a notable milestone.
news.headline: Dow Jones rises by 250 points on U.S.-UK trade deal, Boeing surges, Bitcoin surpasses $100,000 amid broad market gains.

news.summary: Galecto, Inc. reported its operating and financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company focused on developing treatments for oncology and liver diseases, with CEO Dr. Hans Schambye highlighting progress on GB3226, a dual inhibitor for AML. Cash and equivalents stood at $11.9 million as of March 31, 2025, enough to fund operations into 2026. R&D expenses were $0.7 million, down from $2.5 million in the prior year quarter. General admin expenses were $1.9 million, down from $3.3 million. Net loss for Q1 2025 was $2.5 million. Galecto is advancing drug candidates like GB1211 for liver cirrhosis and oncology indications, and BRM-1420 for AML. The company's financial position and future plans are outlined for potential investors.
news.headline: Galecto reported Q1 2025 results, $11.9M in cash, and decreased expenses. Their focus is on cancer and liver disease treatments.

news.summary: ACT Energy Technologies Ltd reported their financial results for the first quarter of 2025. They had revenues of $135.4 million, up 6% sequentially, with Adjusted EBITDAS of $19.7 million, a 12% increase from the previous quarter. Net income was $7.2 million, lower than $11.6 million in 2024 Q1. Operating days in Canada declined by 3% and in the US ramped up by 7% sequentially, contrasting with a 17% decline in US operating days year-over-year. The Company's gross margin percentage was 22%, and Adjusted gross margin percentage was 28%. They purchased 742,699 common shares under their normal course issuer bid for $4.5 million. The Company's liquidity was strengthened with $61.3 million undrawn capacity and $12.9 million cash balance. They successfully deployed 24 Rime MWD systems in the US by Q1, with plans for 26 more by Q2. President Tom Connors highlighted solid improvement in North American operating days. The Company aims to expand margins with selective investments and repurchase shares, strengthening financial position while expecting continued solid activity through the year. They anticipate a range of 40 to 50 daily job operations in the US and steady activity in Canada. Despite macroeconomic challenges, the Company remains cautiously optimistic. The financial highlights showed Adjusted EBITDAS of $19,699, net income of $7,248, cash flow of $18,685, and free cash flow of $7,875 in Q1 of 2025. Operating days decreased by 9% from the previous year, leading to an 18% decline in revenues. The company remains focused on reducing costs and increasing margins through technological investments.
news.headline: ACT Energy Technologies reports $135.4 million in Q1 revenues with $19.7 million in Adjusted EBITDAS, while net income was $7.2 million, showing a modest increase in performance. Company purchasing 742,699 common shares worth $4.5 million under their normal course issuer bid. Cash flow from operating activities increased to $18.7 million, and free cash flow rose to $7.9 million. Loans and borrowings reduced slightly to $50.3 million by March 31, 2025. The Company has undrawn capacity of $61.3 million, strengthening liquidity. Activities saw a slight decline in operating days and revenues compared to the previous year, with the U.S. experiencing some challenges in operating days and revenues. Margin expansion was witnessed in U.S. directional business with the deployment of Rime MWD systems. President Tom Connors optimistic about the Company's outlook and capital allocation plan."

news.summary: After conducting a strategic review and reprioritizing its pipeline, the company has decided to enhance its focus on its next-generation ADC portfolio. This decision will lead to a sharpened product candidate focus, with a significant emphasis on developing and advancing ADCs. The company will be targeting a total of XADC candidates for further development, highlighting a more streamlined and efficient approach to drug development. This move reflects the company's commitment to innovation and growth within the ADC space.
news.headline: Sutro Biopharma highlights Q1 2025 earnings and ADC portfolio focus after restructuring pipeline.

news.summary: The board of directors of Ecolab Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.65 per common share, payable on July 15, 2025. Shareholders of record as of June 17, 2025, will receive the dividend. Ecolab has consistently paid dividends on its common stock for 88 years. Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) is a leading global provider of water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions and services, catering to millions of customers worldwide.
news.headline: Ecolab declares $0.65 quarterly cash dividend per share, to be paid on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 17, 2025.

news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, Ecolab Inc. revealed during its annual stockholders meeting that all thirteen director nominees listed in the proxy statement were elected for a one-year term concluding in May 2026. Additionally, shareholders voted to approve, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the named executive officers outlined in the proxy statement. The appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers was also ratified during the meeting.
news.headline: Ecolab Inc. had 13 director nominees elected for a one-year term, with executive compensation approved by stockholders.

news.summary: Theriva Biologics, a clinical-stage company focused on developing cancer treatments, recently completed a public offering of 6,818,180 shares of common stock and warrants to purchase the same number of shares at a combined price of $1.10 per share. The offering generated around $7.5 million in total gross proceeds for the Company, not including fees and expenses. The warrants included in the offering have an exercise price of $1.10 per share, are immediately exercisable, and will expire five years from their date of issuance.
news.headline: Theriva Biologics closes $7.5M public offering with 6,818,180 shares at $1.10 each, for cancer therapeutics.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. disclosed that it will publicly reveal its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 post-market closure on May 14, 2025. BioRestorative, a company traded on NASDAQ under BRTX, specializes in stem cell-based treatments and merchandise. news.summary: Houston-based U.S. Energy Corporation, listed as USEG on NASDAQ, revealed plans to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 12, 2025, prior to the market opening. news.summary: In New York on May 8, 2025, investment firm Cohen & Steers, Inc. announced via PRNewswire that their assets under management stood at a preliminary $87.5 billion as of April 30, 2025. This marked a slight decline of $70 million from the previous month, when assets were at $87.6 billion as of March 31, 2025. The decrease in assets was primarily attributed to distributions made during this period.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers' assets under management drop to $87.5 billion in April 2025, $70 million decrease from March.

news.summary: The Greater San Antonio's Regional Economic Partnership has achieved a major feat by being ranked among the top 20 economic development organizations in the United States, as per the prestigious recognition received on May 8, 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the organization's commitment to driving economic growth and prosperity in the region. The 2025 Mac... award signifies the excellence and impact of the Greater:SATX Regional Economic Partnership in the national economic development landscape. This achievement underscores the significance of their efforts and places them in a leading position among economic development organizations, showcasing their dedication to enhancing the economic vitality of the Greater San Antonio area.
news.headline: greater:SATX Regional Economic Partnership wins 2025 Mac Conway Award, ranking among top 20 economic development organizations in the nation.

The RSUs were granted on May 7, 2025. Esperion is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ESPR.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Hepsiburada, a prominent Turkish e-commerce platform operating as D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading and listed as HEPS on NASDAQ, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Hepsiburada reveals Q1 2025 financial results in Istanbul, May 08, 2025, under NASDAQ: HEPS, a Turkish e-commerce leader.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario, BioSyent Inc. will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 15, 2025, following market hours. The report will cover the three months ended March 31, 2025. René Goehrum, the President and CEO of BioSyent, will present the results. The Company, listed as TSX Venture: RX, will make the presentation accessible on its website upon release.
news.headline: BioSyent to release Q1 earnings on May 15, 2025, TSX Venture: RX, CEO René Goehrum presenting, available on website.

news.summary: New England Biolabs (NEB®) has recently been recertified as a B Corp, showcasing its prominent position as a frontrunner in promoting ethical life science research worldwide. This also signifies the company's comprehensive dedication to environmental sustainability and ethical practices. The recertification was announced on May 8, 2025, in Ipswich, Mass. The prestigious recognition reaffirms NEB's commitment to upholding high standards in its operations, with a strong focus on environmental stewardship and social responsibility. This achievement underscores NEB's position as a global leader in the industry.
news.headline: NEB recertified as a B Corp, emphasizing global leadership in responsible life science research. Stressed commitment to environmental stewardship and social responsibility.

news.summary: TULSA, Oklahoma - Today, ONE Gas, Inc. revealed its intention to conduct a public offering of 2,500,000 shares of its common stock (NYSE: OGS). The company plans to execute a forward sale agreement with JPMorgan Chase as part of this offering.
news.headline: ONE Gas, Inc. to offer 2.5M shares of common stock, partnering with JPMorgan Chase.

news.summary: Pinterest Inc (NYSE: PINS) released their Q1 financial results, surpassing revenue estimates with $855 million, higher than the projected $846.59 million. The company reported adjusted earnings of 23 cents per share, falling short of the anticipated 26 cents per share. Total revenue grew by 16% compared to the previous year. Pinterest experienced a 10% increase in global monthly active users, now totaling 570 million. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Pinterest stock surges on Q1 earnings with revenue of $855 million, beating estimates. Monthly active users reach 570 million.

news.summary: Michelle Bond, wife of former FTX Digital Markets co-CEO Ryan Salame facing federal campaign finance charges, seeks dismissal alleging US prosecutors misled Salame in a plea deal. Bond claims prosecutors promised not to charge her, but obtained Salame's plea through deception. Bond filed a dismissal request for one charge in May, linked to charges from August 2024 for various campaign finance violations during her 2022 US House of Representatives run. Salame claimed his deal included not charging Bond, serving over seven years after pleading guilty. Former FTX executives faced legal battles post-FTX collapse, with Salame's sentence reduced by a year. Bond implicated her Republican political running as a factor in the charges. Other FTX executives like Sam Bankman-Fried and Caroline Ellison faced trials and prison sentences.
news.headline: FTX exec's wife claims gov't manipulated plea deal. May 7 filing requests dismissal for Michelle Bond. Prosecutors charged her in August 2024 with conspiracy to cause unlawful campaign contributions. Related: Ryan Salame's prison sentence reduced by 1 year. Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried sentenced to 25 years in prison, seeking pardon. Caroline Ellison sentenced to 2 years in prison, Nishad Singh and Gary Wang received time served in 2024. No crypto legal precedent set after XRP win.

news.summary: Negin Nazemi has recently joined Massumi + Consoli from Gibson Dunn as the firm expands its services to meet the increasing need for partner-led guidance in middle market private equity transactions. This nationwide law firm based in Los Angeles is known for its excellence in private equity and mergers and acquisitions. The development comes as the firm experiences growing demand for specialized legal counsel in this sector. The move signifies a strategic effort to bolster their team with talent from renowned firms like Gibson Dunn.
news.headline: Massumi + Consoli law firm hires Negin Nazemi from Gibson Dunn in LA to support middle market private equity; firm growing nationwide.

The Selling Stockholders aim to offer a sizeable portion of their shares in an upcoming transaction.

news.summary: In Denver, Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a prominent provider of human-centered enterprise AI solutions, shared its first-quarter results for 2025. President and CEO Ryan Steelberg highlighted the positive performance, expressing satisfaction with the stable business growth. The company reported strong momentum entering Q2 due to (i) stabilized operations and (ii) improved financial status post the recently concluded transactions. The specific details regarding revenue, profit, and other key financial metrics were not disclosed in the news.
news.headline: Veritone (NASDAQ: VERI) reports Q1 2025 results; solid topline performance and strong Q2 momentum. CEO optimistic.

news.summary: QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) unveiled its financial outcomes for Q1 2025, showcasing a loss of $(0.03) per basic and diluted share for common shareholders. In this quarter, revenue figures saw a slight increase in software product net revenue from $3,480,000 in 2024 to $3,517,000 in 2025, marking a 1.1% rise. However, service and other net revenue experienced a decline from $10,956,000 in 2024 to $9,991,000 in 2025, displaying an 8.8% decrease. The total net revenue for the first quarter of 2025 was $13,508,000.
news.headline: QXO Inc. reports Q1 2025 results with a loss of $(0.03) per share. Revenue: Software $3.5M, Services $9.9M, Total $13.5M.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), a prominent connectivity cloud company, revealed its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The CEO, Matthew Prince, highlighted a record-breaking achievement with the largest contract valued at over $100 million, attributed to the Workers developer platform. Additionally, Cloudflare also secured the lengthiest SASE contract up to that point. Prince expressed optimism and strong performance at the beginning of 2025.
news.headline: Cloudflare reports strong Q1 2025 results with largest contract in history worth over $100 million. CEO optimistic for year.

news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc., a prominent player in launch services and space systems, announced its financial outcomes for the fiscal first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. CEO Sir Peter Beck highlighted the noteworthy performance achieved, with a revenue reaching $123 million, close to a record-breaking figure. This revenue depicts wins in both the launch and space systems divisions, showcasing the company's robust start to the fiscal year.
news.headline: Rocket Lab reports Q1 2025 revenue of $123m, a 32% YoY growth. CEO Sir Peter Beck praises strong performance.

news.summary: Information Services Group (ISG) disclosed their financial performance for the first quarter ended on March 31, 2025, in Stamford, Connecticut. The company, traded under Nasdaq as III, reported its earnings for the period.
news.headline: ISG reports Q1 2025 results with revenue of $100 million. Stock symbol: III, Nasdaq.

The company, known for developing the POZ Platform™ drug optimization technology, released this information today. Key highlights from the report include updates on recent business activities.
news.headline: Serina Therapeutics (NYSE: SER) reports Q1 2025 financial results and business highlights in Huntsville, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: SSR Mining Inc. disclosed the successful election of all nine director nominees at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, held on May 8, 2025. Out of the total votes cast, Rod Antal received 121,862,232 votes for (90.60%), with 12,650,854 votes against (9.40%), and 14,266,558 broker non-votes. Another nominee, Thomas R. Bates, J, also achieved a similar voting pattern. The company, listed on Nasdaq/TSX under SSRM, secured a strong mandate from the shareholders for its directorial board during the Meeting.
news.headline: SSR Mining's 2025 Annual Meeting sees 121.86M votes for Rod Antal (90.60%) with 12.65M withheld (9.40%).

news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. revealed its plan to launch the Neutron rocket for the U.S. Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) to support a Rocket Cargo mission. This mission aims to facilitate point-to-point cargo transportation and enhance global defense logistics. Neutron, a medium-lift reusable rocket, marks a significant advancement for Rocket Lab in commercial launch services. The launch is scheduled for the future and demonstrates Rocket Lab's commitment to innovation in space systems. Through this mission, Rocket Lab aims to revolutionize commercial launch capabilities and contribute to national defense efforts.
news.headline: Rocket Lab to launch Neutron rocket for U.S. Air Force's Rocket Cargo mission, advancing defense logistics. $RKLB.

news.summary: Flowserve Corporation, a prominent company offering flow control products and services worldwide, has launched its 2024 ESG Report emphasizing The Power of Purpose. The report showcases how Flowserve's operational structure, known as the Flowserve Business System, is driving advancements in its ESG priorities of Climate, Culture, and Core Responsibility. This aligns with its 3D growth strategy to support corporate and sustainability goals. (Character count: 277)
news.headline: Flowserve (NYSE: FLS) releases 2024 ESG report on The Power of Purpose, featuring its progress in areas of Climate, Culture, and Responsibility.
